question_text: A wind farm produces 2,400 kW of electrical power on an average day. How much electrical energy does the wind farm generate in 5 hours?
explanation: Energy is calculated using the formula: Energy (kWh) = Power (kW) × Time (hours). So 2,400 kW × 5 hours = 12,000 kWh. This can also be written as 12 MWh (megawatt-hours).
